name: ai-video-generator
description: AI video generation for Claude — Veo 3.1 (fal.ai + Gemini), Happy Horse (Alibaba), and Seedance 2.0 (ByteDance). Text-to-video, image-to-video, first+last frame, reference images, video extension. Supports fal.ai and Google Gemini API keys.
author: michaelericksonh5

ai-video.description: AI video generation via Veo 3.1, Happy Horse, and Seedance 2.0 (fal.ai + Gemini)
